steps.name: Activate Payment Method
steps.description: Enable a specific payment method for a merchant.

data.message: PM_0010 - Register payment method failed: SWISH registration already exists.

reqParams.name: storeId
reqParams.description: Optional store identifier to associate payment methods with a specific store.

reqParams.name: merchantId
reqParams.description: Optional merchant identifier for the payment method configuration.

reqParams.name: card
reqParams.description: Card payment method configuration. Set to true to enable card payments.

reqParams.name: amex
reqParams.description: American Express payment method configuration. Set to true to enable AMEX payments.

reqParams.name: swish
reqParams.description: Swedish mobile payment method configuration. Set to true to enable Swish payments.

reqParams.name: klarna
reqParams.description: Buy now, pay later payment method configuration. Set to true to enable Klarna payments.

reqParams.name: b2binv
reqParams.description: B2B invoice payment method configuration. Set to true to enable B2B invoice payments.

reqParams.name: acc2acc
reqParams.description: Account to account transfer payment method configuration. Set to true to enable account to account transfers.

reqParams.name: svipps
reqParams.description: Norwegian mobile payment method. Set to true to enable Vipps payment method.

reqParams.name: smobilepay
reqParams.description: Danish mobile payment method. Set to true to enable MobilePay payment method.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Array of payment method registration results.

resParams.name: paymentMethodId
resParams.description: Unique identifier assigned to the payment method (present on success).

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Registration status for this payment method, either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: Error message if registration failed (present on error).

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the overall status of the request.

steps.name: Fetch Payment Method Details
steps.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific payment method.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: paymentMethodId
resParams.description: PaymentMethod ID of the payment method.

resParams.name: paymentMethod
resParams.description: Specifies the payment method. It can be one of the following: 'AMEX', 'SWISH', or 'CARD’.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the payment method, indicated as either ACTIVATED' or 'DEACTIVATED’.

resParams.name: amexMID
resParams.description: Returns AMEX MID for AMEX payment method.

resParams.name: acquirerMID
resParams.description: Returns the respective Acquirer MID for CARD payment method.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.
